summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/08/2024
DCE iron ore futures today. the main contract I2501 closed 776.5. an increase of 1.97% throughout the day; The traders'enthusiasm for shipping is moderate; Steel mills are cautiously observing, with general willingness to purchase.
